item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 11min Matt Fitzpatrick holds a three-stroke lead over Scottie Scheffler followin
item.description:
PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 11min Matt Fitzpatrick holds a three-stroke lead over Scottie Scheffler following the third round of the RBC Heritage. It marks his fifth 54-hole lead/co-lead on TOUR.
Fitzpatrick is 2-for-4 converting to victory (2019 Arnold Palmer Invitational presented by Mastercard/2nd, 2022 U.S. Mostrar más 10 2 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 26min Michael Bradley, 2011 Puerto Rico Open, 68-68-68-68. Cita Fahr Out Man @FahrOutMan · 1
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 26min Michael Bradley, 2011 Puerto Rico Open, 68-68-68-68. Cita Fahr Out Man @FahrOutMan · 1h @JustinRayGolf Potgieter rolls thru three rds 67-67-67
Who was the last golfer to go all 4 rds with exact same score ?
Ever been a tourney winner who did it ?? 3 11 6 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 29min Matt Fitzpatrick will hold a share of the 54-hole lead for the 5th time in his PGA Tou
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 29min Matt Fitzpatrick will hold a share of the 54-hole lead for the 5th time in his PGA Tour career. Won 2 of the previous 4.
Players with a 3-shot lead through 54 holes the last 20 years win 48% of the time. Fitzpatrick would move as high as 3rd in OWGR with a win. 1 3 10 3 mil
